completed.title: All-adversity config (ncrc_adversity_all.yaml)
completed.detail: Created with all 7 vehicle adversity classes at probability=1.0 using state_8am.xml.gz rush-hour base. VRU excluded — no pedestrian agents in environment.

completed.title: Adversity fire logging — class-level tracking
completed.detail: Patched nade.py and adversity_manager.py to log adversity_class (e.g. LanechangeAdversity) on every fire event. Previously only logged predicted_collision_type which is shared across multiple classes.

completed.title: Fixed DefenceLogger crash in LanechangeAbortAdversity
completed.detail: Added missing store_valid_distance_offset() and get_last_valid_distance_offset() methods to defence_logger.py. Was crashing with AttributeError on every run.

completed.title: Construction zone netconvert bypass
completed.detail: Rewrote generate_enhanced_network() in connection_manager.py. Replaced 3-step netconvert pipeline with shutil.copy2(). Root cause: SUMO C++ validator rejects manually-inserted via-lanes in TLS junctions. Validated: exit code 0, TLS count 197=197, MD5 identical.

completed.title: 520toRapp Autoware map synced to cloud
completed.detail: Added pointcloud_map.pcd, 520toRapp_lanelet2.osm, and map_projector_info.yaml to autoware upload_maps.sh and sync_maps.sh. Pushed to B2 and committed to hht-dev branch.

completed.title: Launched observe-haotian dashboard
completed.detail: Built and deployed this dashboard to GitHub Pages (910834430.github.io/observe-haotian) with password protection, live clock, charts, and daily task tracking.

in_progress.title: Adversity coverage loop — Run #2 stuck
in_progress.detail: Vehicle deadlock at edge 4414481701#0 (speed 0.26 m/s, reroute blocked). Process consumed 73 GB RAM before being killed. Fix: reduce --time-to-teleport from 200 → 60.

todo.title: Fix vehicle deadlock and restart adversity loop
todo.detail: Reduce --time-to-teleport from 200 to 60 in ncrc_adversity_all.yaml so stuck vehicles teleport out faster. Restart test_all_adversities.py loop.

todo.title: Complete adversity coverage test
todo.detail: Run loop to completion. Confirm which of 7 adversity classes fire with rush-hour traffic. Expected hard ones: HeadonAdversity, TrafficRuleAdversity, MergeAdversity.

todo.title: End-to-end static adversity test
todo.detail: Run ncrc_static_adversity.yaml with new construction zone fix. Confirm stalled vehicle + construction zone deploy with no TLS errors.

todo.title: Filter route file to NCRC-only
todo.detail: Filter aa_with_types.rou.xml to ~15,621 routes (3.2%) overlapping NCRC edges → produce aa_ncrc_only.rou.xml for denser local AV traffic.

this_week: Drafted and finalized the Q2 data requirements package for Isuzu, covering three categories: HD Maps (§1), Driving Trajectory Data for SMART Model Adaptation (§2), and Multimodal Sensor Data for the Sensor Reconstruction Pipeline (§3).
Defined the full per-clip data schema for SMART training (agents.json, map.json, traffic_lights.json, manifest.json) and published the Inchor SMART Driving Data Contract v0.1 as a companion document.

Refined Section 2 based on team review: removed Waymo TFRecords dependency, replaced with explicit field schema; increased data volume minimums; added labeling and precision requirements; clarified traffic signal format (Time Phase Diagram preferred); updated map coverage buffer to 500 m–1 km.
Prepared client-facing email to Isuzu with all three attached specification documents.

Designed a 3-stage adversity integration plan for the NCRC co-sim and completed Stage 1 (TeraSim/SUMO only, no Autoware, no CNDE): created ncrc_adversity_stage1.yaml, aa_stage1.sumocfg, and ncrc_stage1_bvs.rou.xml with hand-crafted BV placement calibrated to the AV's actual post-warmup position. Key discovery: all NCRC edges are highway.secondary (17.88 m/s < 25 m/s threshold), so get_location() returns intersection — adversity location filter must be intersection, not highway. Verified: 52 cutin + 19 rearend adversity fires per 600 s run, consistent across 8+ runs via scripts/verify_ncrc_stage1.sh.
next_week: Send the Q2 data requirements package to Isuzu and await feedback.

Stage 2: Re-enable CNDE on the NCRC co-sim (cnde.enabled: true) and verify adversity still fires with neural vehicle control active — check command resolution order so adversity is not silently suppressed by CNDE.
Stage 3: Integrate Autoware into the co-sim and validate full-stack adversity triggering during live AV navigation.
notes: Isuzu is unlikely to have Waymo-compatible TFRecords; the data contract now specifies a decomposed JSON/CSV schema instead. WOMD field naming is still recommended as a reference to reduce conversion overhead.
Stage 1 verification: run bash scripts/verify_ncrc_stage1.sh from ~/Projects/Isuzu_cosim/TeraSim. To view in SUMO-GUI, set gui_flag: true in ncrc_adversity_stage1.yaml before running.

this_week: Fixed OSM map and related traffic light issues.
Ran loop tests for current TeraSim with Autoware.
next_week: Meet with Isuzu to update their local git and recent co-sim changes.
Create a web link for large files such as route file, weights, and OSM maps.
Fix permissive green pass behavior in Autoware (right of way module).
Test co-sim speed and confirm bottleneck.
notes: Do not rely on AI for its visual ability.
